heading: Development of water supplies for waterfowl management in California; reauthorization of Central Valley Project
label: 695d Development of water supplies for waterfowl management in California; reauthorization of Central Valley Project
text: The entire Central Valley project, California, heretofore authorized under the Act of (, 850), and reauthorized under the Act of (, 1199), the Act of (), and the Act of (), is reauthorized and declared to be for the purposes set forth in said Acts, and also for the use of the waters thereof for fish and wildlife purposes, subject to such priorities as are applicable under said Acts.August 26, 1937October 17, 1940October 14, 1949September 26, 195050 Stat. 84454 Stat. 119863 Stat. 85264 Stat. 1036
